privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env analyze_pv_power_ramp_rates task by confirming the task simulates a 100 MW PySAM PV plant. By running an independent PySAM Pvwattsv8 simulation with Phoenix TMY data, I confirmed the expected bounds (generation peak ~83 MW within 60-110 MW, up-ramp ~52.8 within 15-90 MW, and down-ramp ~-61.1 within -90 to -15 MW) represent valid thresholds. Additionally, I discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable because the success specification ('verifier.py::verify_analyze_pv_power_ramp_rates') points to a non-existent script.
